title: Korak 9

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should have two if statements in your code.
Your second if statement should use isTimmyAGamer as its condition.
You should log "Timmy loves to play World of Warcraft." to the console within your second if statement.
tests.testString: assert.match(__helpers.removeJSComments(code), /(?:\bif\s*\(.+\)\s*\{.+\}.*)\bif\s*\(\s*isTimmyAGamer\s*\)\s*\{\s*console\s*\.\s*log\s*\(\s*('|"|`)Timmy loves to play World of Warcraft.\1\s*\)\s*;?\s*\}/s);

description:
Sada kreiraj još jednu if deklaraciju koja koristi isTimmyAGamer kao uslov. Unutar tela vaše if deklaracije, loguj "Timmy loves to play World of Warcraft." na konzolu.

Napomena da nećeš videti ništa logovano na konzolu jer je uslov vaše nove if deklaracije netačan.
